import { useLanguage } from '../../LanguageContext'; import NewsWidget from '../../components/NewsWidget'; import './HomePage.css'; function HomePage() { const { t } = useLanguage(); return (

{t('welcomeTitle')}

{t('welcomeSubtitle')}

{t('ourMission')}

{t('missionText')}

{t('academicPrograms')}

{t('programsText')}

{t('community')}

{t('communityText')}

); } export default HomePage;
